channel.title: Recent page changes from site "SCP Foundation" (a Wikidot site)

item.title: "SCP-1047-J" -
item.description:
Page: SCP-1047-J (scp-1047-j)
Current revision number: 7
Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 02:45:08 +0000
Change type:
Change comments: Added tags: redirect.
By: aismallard

Page content preview:
SCP-1047-J is made by TroyL

item.title: "SCP-1205" - source change
item.description:
Page: SCP-1205 (scp-1205)
Current revision number: 33
Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 00:54:35 +0000
Change type: source change
Change comments: The incident report is consistently referred to as G everywhere but the collapsable, where it was C. This should be minor enough to just boldly fix
By: Gatemansgc

Page content preview:
SCP-1205 as of 7/██/██ Item #: SCP-1205 Object Class: Safe Special Containment Procedures: SCP-1205 should be kept in a windowless containment cell with low light, facing a surveillance camera....
item.content:encoded:
Page: SCP-1205 (scp-1205)
Current revision number: 33
Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 00:54:35 +0000
Change type: source change
Change comments: The incident report is consistently referred to as G everywhere but the collapsable, where it was C. This should be minor enough to just boldly fix
By: Gatemansgc

Page content preview:
SCP-1205 as of 7/██/██ Item #: SCP-1205 Object Class: Safe Special Containment Procedures: SCP-1205 should be kept in a windowless containment cell with low light, facing a surveillance camera....

item.title: "LaRue Post - Willie's shine" - source change
item.content:encoded:
Page: LaRue Post - Willie's shine (la-rue-posts-willie-s-shine)
Current revision number: 12
Date changed: Fri, 08 Jan 2021 23:41:26 +0000
Change type: source change
By: Vivarium

Page content preview:
The following is a posting found on the Message Board in the Market Square in La Rue Macabre. La Rue Macabre For Sale: Willie's Moonshine ( 10$ ) Come and get it...
